---
applyTo: "**/*.tsx,**/*.ts,**/*.css"
description: "Apply general frontend quality rules for React, TypeScript, Tailwind, and maintainable workflow."
---

# Frontend Quality Rules

Apply these baseline rules while editing frontend code:

- Prioritize readability and predictable behavior.
- Keep components focused and avoid over-engineering.
- Prefer explicit typing and avoid unsafe patterns.
- Keep styling consistent with project tokens and utility conventions.
- Preserve accessibility and keyboard usability for interactive UI.
- Write clear, scoped changes that are easy to review.
